subtitle: Record, transcribe, remember
shortDescription: Record private voice notes on iPhone, search their offline transcripts, and use OneVoice for global dictation on Mac.

openSourceCredits.name: Qwen3-ASR
openSourceCredits.note: Optional on-device final transcription model. Model licensing terms apply separately.

openSourceCredits.name: MLX Swift
